meta.title: USAF Fighter Pilot on How Flyovers Work
meta.description:
Hasard Lee explains how fighter pilots conduct the flyovers you see at major sporting events.

SUBSCRIBE for regular videos▶ https://www.youtube.com/c/HasardLee

HOW TO become a FIGHTER PILOT: 
https://www.professionalsplaybook.com/pilot-newsletter

How to connect:
